//: Lighthouse CI budgets — enforces the constitution's 95+ targets (Visual Polish Over Feature Count). The accessibility category runs axe-core audits, so this gate covers the axe/a11y requirement. A11y / best-practices / SEO are deterministic (DOM + headers, not timing) so they gate as hard errors at 0.95. Performance is lab-timing-sensitive on shared CI runners (TBT/LCP vary with runner CPU load) so it gates as a warn at 0.95 to surface regressions without flaking the merge — promote to error once the observed CI floor is stable. The server is started by the workflow (standalone build) before lhci runs; no startServerCommand here.
